market_context:
Cohort size: 201 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £154.60
Median 90-day occupancy: 47.8%

title_variants: Spacious 2‑Bed with Big Balcony – Great Value
City Lake View Flat – Low Price, High Comfort
analysis.rewritten_desc:
Welcome to your spacious city lake‑view apartment, perfectly designed for up to four guests. Enjoy a bright, open‑plan living area that opens onto a large balcony where you can soak in panoramic lake scenery—ideal for morning coffee or evening sunsets. The bedroom comfortably sleeps two, while a sofa bed in the lounge provides extra sleeping space. A fully equipped kitchen lets you prepare meals, and the modern bathroom offers fresh towels and toiletries. 

At just £89.6 per night, your stay costs 42% less than the city’s median nightly rate of £154.60, delivering exceptional value without compromising comfort. The property has earned a 4.94 rating from 69 satisfied guests, reflecting its clean standards and friendly atmosphere. Although you’re not yet a Superhost, the high review score shows strong guest satisfaction. 

Availability over the next 90 days shows 48.9% of nights already booked, leaving 46 open nights you can fill with the right marketing tweaks. Hosted by Juwon, who is new to hosting but eager to provide a seamless experience, this entire‑home rental offers a private, self‑contained stay with all the essentials you need for a memorable city getaway.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use a sunrise shot of the big balcony with lake view as the cover photo, followed by bedroom, living area, and kitchen shots to showcase the full space.
key_diagnosis: Add high‑value amenities: currently 0 amenities are listed; adding parking, Wi‑Fi, and entertainment can boost appeal.
Revise the title to highlight the 42% price advantage (rate £89.6 vs median £154.60) and lake view for stronger SEO.
Upload professional photos for all main rooms; the listing currently has an unknown (likely low) photo count, which hurts conversion.
analysis.outreach_hook: Your apartment is priced at £89.6/night – 42% below the city median – yet you’re only at 48.9% occupancy, leaving huge upside for more bookings.
